source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A reversible steady-state device receives a flow of 1 kg/s air at 400 K, 450 kPa and the air leaves at 600 K, 100 kPa. Heat transfer of 900 kW is added from a reservoir, 50 kW is rejected, and some heat transfer takes place. Find the rate of work produced.

Heat transfer of 900 kW is added from a reservoir, 50 kW is rejected, and some heat transfer takes place. Find the rate of work produced.
